description: Meanwhile, Daisy continues searching for the rest of the team. May, separated from the others, encounters Deke, who subdues and restrains her, forcibly implanting a 'metric' device into her wrist. The tension builds as both Daisy and May navigate threats on their own in the hostile, unfamiliar outpost.

transcript.line: Yes, that was right, and not the only one.
You know, I didn't want to hurt you, but the idea is starting to grow on me. I deserve better than this.

Damn. I was not prepared for that, I got to admit. You pack a big punch for such a small package. I got to read the fine print next time. I hate wasting the charge on that thing. Honestly, I wasn't trying to hurt you, but you had a lead pipe at the ready, and I can't... Okay. I guess we'll stick with the first impression.
I don't know what you did to these people or why I was dragged here, but...
Save it. The less I know, the better.
